errors.description: Tenant has attribution_capture entitlement off. Middleware becomes a no-op; downstream events attribute against a null profile.
GET /api/v1/campaigns/rollup routes refused because attribution_rollup entitlement is off (Small tier). Response includes upgrade CTA.
attribution_merge entitlement off (non-Enterprise). Attempted merge via API or CLI refused.
attribution_import entitlement off (non-Enterprise). Bulk CSV import refused.

NOT a route-level error — internal signal. ConsentGate::allows('marketing') returned false; AttributionMiddleware refused persistence + fired AttributionSuppressedByConsent. Request still succeeds (200); the attribution just doesn't persist.
subject_type value not in enum { user, athlete, lead, anonymous_session }.
subject_id does not match subject_type (e.g. subject_type='user' but subject_id is a session UUID).
Attempted backward lifecycle transition (e.g. converted → identified). Only forward transitions permitted; reset is the only path to erase state.
Attempted mutation of first_touch_* fields. First-touch is IMMUTABLE post-create — the observer refuses. Every fire indicates a write path that shouldn't exist (data-integrity signal).
Attempted UPDATE on an attribution_touchpoints row (fields other than metadata). Touchpoints are append-only. Every fire indicates a write path that shouldn't exist.
Attempted to create an attribution_touchpoints row without a resolvable attributions row. Every touchpoint requires a parent profile.
landing_page or referrer failed URL validation (not a valid URL, too long, contains characters outside RFC 3986).
click_id jsonb blob failed schema validation (unknown provider key, malformed provider_hint, etc.).
session_id is not a valid UUID v4.
ip_hash is not a valid SHA-256 hex string (64 chars, [0-9a-f]).
utm_source / utm_medium / utm_campaign / utm_content / utm_term exceeded max length (see config.attribution.capture.max_utm_length).
Attempted merge across tenants (into.tenant_id != from.tenant_id). Refused with critical severity — cross-tenant merges are a security concern.
The target of a merge must be an identified profile — merging into an anonymous target is refused (would defeat the purpose).
Attempted to absorb more than max_anonymous_absorbed (default 10) profiles into one identified profile in a single merge. Configured to prevent runaway merges from misconfigured proxies.
A reset for this attribution is already in the 90-day audit hold. Duplicate reset requests are refused.
Reset requested by a user whose tenant does not match the attribution.tenant_id. Cross-tenant reset is refused.
CSV import file failed schema validation (missing required columns, header mismatch, unsupported column types).
CSV import exceeded max rows per file (default 50,000). Split the import into multiple files.
ReconcileAttributionCountsJob detected drift between denormalised touchpoint_count and actual row count. Every occurrence is a data-integrity signal (should be 0 in production).
